name: Fighting Style
mechanicalSummary: Choose one Fighting Style option that provides a persistent combat bonus. Champion subclass gains a second style at L10.
notes: Choice-based; current app descriptive-only.

name: Second Wind
mechanicalSummary: Use a bonus action to regain hit points equal to 1d10 + your fighter level.
notes: Currently descriptive-only in app.

name: Action Surge
scalingSummary: 1 use at L2, 2 uses at L17
mechanicalSummary: On your turn, take one additional action. Does not grant additional bonus actions.

evidence.pointer: Fighter L2: Action Surge; L17: Action Surge improvement; featureDescriptions

notes: Not an action itself — it's a free activation that grants an additional action. Classified as special.
2 uses at L17, but only once per turn.

name: Extra Attack
scalingSummary: 2 attacks at L5, 3 at L11, 4 at L20
mechanicalSummary: Attack multiple times when taking the Attack action. Scales to 3 attacks at L11 and 4 at L20.

evidence.pointer: Fighter L5: Extra Attack; L11/L20: Extra Attack improvement; featureDescriptions

notes: Fighter is unique in gaining 3rd and 4th attacks. This passively modifies the universal Attack action.

name: Indomitable
trigger: When you fail a saving throw
scalingSummary: 1 use at L9, 2 at L13, 3 at L17
mechanicalSummary: Reroll a failed saving throw. Must use the new roll.

evidence.pointer: Fighter L9: Indomitable; L13/L17: Indomitable improvement; featureDescriptions

notes: Triggered, not an action — reactive reroll.
Currently descriptive-only.

name: Improved Critical (Champion)
scalingSummary: Crit on 19-20 at L3, 18-20 at L15
mechanicalSummary: Weapon attacks score a critical hit on a roll of 19 or 20. At L15 (Superior Critical), expands to 18-20.

evidence.pointer: champion L3: Improved Critical; L15: Superior Critical

notes: Passive modification of attack resolution.

name: Remarkable Athlete (Champion)
mechanicalSummary: Add half proficiency bonus (round up) to any Str/Dex/Con check that doesn't already use proficiency. Running long jump distance increases by Str modifier in feet.

name: Survivor (Champion)
trigger: At the start of each of your turns when you are at or below half HP and above 0 HP
mechanicalSummary: Regain 5 + Constitution modifier HP at the start of each turn if you have no more than half your HP and are above 0.

name: Combat Superiority (Battle Master)
scalingSummary: 4 dice at L3 (d8), 5 dice at L7 (d10 at L10, d12 at L18), 6 dice at L15; regain 1 on initiative if none left (L15 Relentless)
mechanicalSummary: Learn and use combat maneuvers powered by superiority dice. Each maneuver typically rides on a weapon attack and adds the superiority die to damage plus an additional effect (trip, disarm, riposte, etc.).
notes: Maneuvers are diverse: some are riders on attacks, others are reactions (Riposte), bonus actions (Feinting Attack), or triggered. Each maneuver would need its own row for a full audit.
Currently descriptive-only in app.

name: Know Your Enemy (Battle Master)
mechanicalSummary: Spend 1 minute observing a creature outside combat to learn if it is your equal, superior, or inferior in two of: Str score, Dex score, Con score, AC, current HP, total class levels, fighter class levels.

name: Weapon Bond (Eldritch Knight)
mechanicalSummary: Perform a 1-hour ritual to bond with a weapon. Bonded weapon cannot be disarmed unless incapacitated, and can be summoned to hand as a bonus action if on the same plane.
notes: Summoning the weapon is a bonus action.

name: War Magic (Eldritch Knight)
trigger: When you use your action to cast a cantrip
scalingSummary: Improves at L18 to work with any spell
mechanicalSummary: When you use your action to cast a cantrip, you can make one weapon attack as a bonus action. At L18 (Improved War Magic), this extends to casting any spell.

evidence.pointer: eldritch-knight L7: War Magic; L18: Improved War Magic

notes: Bonus action gated on casting a cantrip/spell as action.

name: Eldritch Strike (Eldritch Knight)
trigger: When you hit a creature with a weapon attack
mechanicalSummary: When you hit a creature with a weapon attack, it has disadvantage on the next saving throw against a spell you cast before the end of your next turn.
notes: Rider on weapon attack; sets up spellcasting.

name: Arcane Charge (Eldritch Knight)
trigger: When you use your Action Surge
mechanicalSummary: When you use Action Surge, you can teleport up to 30 ft to an unoccupied space you can see, before or after the additional action.
notes: Rider on Action Surge.

name: Arcane Shot (Arcane Archer)
trigger: Once per turn when you fire an arrow from a shortbow or longbow as part of the Attack action
scalingSummary: 2 uses at L3; regain 1 on initiative if none left (L15 Ever-Ready Shot)
mechanicalSummary: Apply a magical Arcane Shot option to an arrow as part of the Attack action. Options include effects like bursting, seeking, beguiling, or banishing arrows. Each option has a specific saving throw and magical effect.
notes: Rider on ranged attack; choice of shot options with distinct effects.

name: Curving Shot (Arcane Archer)
trigger: When you make an attack roll with a magic arrow and miss
mechanicalSummary: Use a bonus action to reroll a missed magic arrow attack against a different target within 60 ft of the original target.

name: Unwavering Mark (Cavalier)
trigger: When you hit a creature with a melee weapon attack
resourceCostSummary: No resource cost, but limited to Strength modifier uses (min 1) for the special bonus attack
rechargeSummary: Long rest (for the special bonus attack)
mechanicalSummary: Mark a creature you hit. Marked creatures have disadvantage on attacks against anyone other than you. If a marked creature damages someone else, you can make a special bonus action attack with advantage that deals extra damage equal to half fighter level on your next turn.

name: Warding Maneuver (Cavalier)
trigger: When you or a creature within 5 ft is hit by an attack
scalingSummary: Uses = Constitution modifier (min 1); d8 roll increases to d10 at L10, d12 at L18
mechanicalSummary: Roll 1d8 and add it to the target's AC against that attack, potentially causing it to miss. Must be wielding a melee weapon or shield.

name: Hold the Line (Cavalier)
mechanicalSummary: Creatures provoke opportunity attacks when they move 5 ft or more within your reach (not just when leaving). If you hit with an OA, target's speed becomes 0 for the rest of the turn.
notes: Modifies the universal opportunity attack trigger.

name: Ferocious Charger (Cavalier)
trigger: When you hit a creature after moving at least 10 ft straight toward it
mechanicalSummary: If you move at least 10 ft straight before hitting a creature, it must make Strength save or be knocked prone. Once per turn.

name: Vigilant Defender (Cavalier)
mechanicalSummary: Gain a special reaction on every creature's turn (except your own) that can only be used for opportunity attacks. This is in addition to your normal reaction.
notes: Essentially infinite OAs per round (one per creature turn). Does not stack with normal reaction.

name: Fighting Spirit (Samurai)
rechargeSummary: Long rest; regain 1 on initiative if none left (L10 Tireless Spirit)
scalingSummary: 3 uses at L3; temp HP: 5 at L3, 10 at L10, 15 at L15
mechanicalSummary: As a bonus action, gain advantage on all weapon attack rolls until end of current turn. Also gain temporary HP (5/10/15 scaling by level).

name: Rapid Strike (Samurai)
trigger: When you have advantage on a weapon attack roll and take the Attack action
mechanicalSummary: If you have advantage on an attack, you can forgo that advantage to make an additional weapon attack against the same target. Once per turn.
notes: Trades advantage for an extra attack — effectively a replacement of advantage with another attack roll.

name: Strength before Death (Samurai)
trigger: When you take damage that reduces you to 0 HP and doesn't kill you outright
mechanicalSummary: Use your reaction to delay falling unconscious and immediately take an extra turn, interrupting the current turn. Normal death save rules apply during the extra turn.
notes: Reaction with 1/LR use.

name: Psionic Strike (Psi Warrior)
trigger: Once per turn, immediately after hitting a target within 30 ft and dealing weapon damage
rechargeSummary: Long rest (all dice); 1 on short rest (L15)
scalingSummary: Dice: 2×PB d6 at L3, d8 at L5, d10 at L11, d12 at L17
mechanicalSummary: Expend one Psionic Energy die to deal force damage equal to die roll + Intelligence modifier to the target.

name: Protective Field (Psi Warrior)
trigger: When you or another creature within 30 ft takes damage
scalingSummary: Die scales: d6 at L3, d8 at L5, d10 at L11, d12 at L17
mechanicalSummary: Use reaction to reduce damage taken by die roll + Intelligence modifier (min 1 reduction).

name: Telekinetic Movement (Psi Warrior)
resourceCostSummary: 1 Psionic Energy die (free once per short/long rest)
rechargeSummary: One free use per short/long rest; additional uses cost dice
mechanicalSummary: Move one loose Large or smaller object or one willing creature (not self) up to 30 ft to an unoccupied space you can see.

name: Psi-Powered Leap (Psi Warrior)
resourceCostSummary: Free once per short/long rest; then 1 Psionic Energy die per use
mechanicalSummary: As a bonus action, gain a flying speed equal to twice your walking speed until end of current turn.

name: Bulwark of Force (Psi Warrior)
mechanicalSummary: As a bonus action, grant half cover (+2 AC, +2 Dex saves) to up to Int modifier creatures (including self) within 30 ft for 1 minute.

name: Telekinetic Master (Psi Warrior)
resourceCostSummary: Cast telekinesis without components; free once per long rest; then 1 Psionic Energy die to cast again
rechargeSummary: One free cast per long rest; additional casts cost dice
mechanicalSummary: Cast telekinesis with no components (spellcasting ability: Intelligence). While concentrating on it, can make one weapon attack as a bonus action each turn.
notes: Grants bonus-action attack while concentrating on telekinesis.

name: Giant's Might (Rune Knight)
scalingSummary: Uses = PB; extra damage: 1d6 at L3, 1d8 at L10, 1d10 at L18; size Huge at L18
mechanicalSummary: As a bonus action, become Large (if smaller) for 1 minute. Advantage on Strength checks/saves. Once per turn, deal extra 1d6 damage on a weapon attack. Size increases to Huge at L18.
notes: State-toggle with combat benefits.

name: Runic Shield (Rune Knight)
trigger: When another creature within 60 ft is hit by an attack roll
mechanicalSummary: Use reaction to force the attacker to reroll the d20 and use the new roll.

name: Manifest Echo (Echo Fighter)
rechargeSummary: No limit; can re-manifest at will
mechanicalSummary: As a bonus action, manifest a translucent echo in an unoccupied space within 15 ft. Echo has AC 14+PB, 1 HP, immunity to conditions. Can swap places with echo using 15 ft of movement.

name: Unleash Incarnation (Echo Fighter)
trigger: When you take the Attack action
mechanicalSummary: When you take the Attack action, make one additional melee attack from the echo's position.

name: Shadow Martyr (Echo Fighter)
trigger: Before an attack roll is made against an ally you can see
mechanicalSummary: Use reaction to teleport echo to within 5 ft of targeted ally. The attack is made against the echo instead. Once per short/long rest.
